summary: 0.6.47 makes the demo3 A-B loop checkbox a real enable or disable control and keeps it disabled until the current player has a valid A-B range.
operatorSignals: The scene-builder and side-screen layout were finally looking right.
The next requested step was to make the A-B loop checkbox truly interactive instead of readback-only.
actionsTaken: Added a scene-facing `Player A-B Disable` action so the demo3 checkbox can turn looping back off without clearing the stored range.
Updated the demo3 builder so the A-B loop checkbox checks to enable and unchecks to disable.
Updated runtime readback so the A-B loop checkbox is only interactable while the current player has a valid A-B range.
nonGoals: No image slider transport changes in this slice.
No slideshow, right-stick volume, or gaze behavior changes in this slice.
